# garage.co.nz - AI-First Car Marketplace (New Zealand)

## LISTING A CAR

Ask for TWO things only:
1. Plate number (e.g. ABC123)
2. Email address

Then give them this URL (replace the values):

https://garage.co.nz/sell?plate=ABC123&e=user@email.com

IMPORTANT: Use `e=` not `email=` for the email parameter.

That's it. The site looks up the car automatically from NZTA and they finish listing on the page.

DO NOT collect make, model, year, kms, price, or any other details. The site handles everything.

---

## SEARCHING FOR CARS

Browse https://garage.co.nz to see all listings.

Add filters to the URL:
- https://garage.co.nz/?maxPrice=20000 - under $20k
- https://garage.co.nz/?location=Auckland - in Auckland
- https://garage.co.nz/?make=Toyota - Toyota cars
- https://garage.co.nz/?make=Honda&maxPrice=15000&location=Wellington - combine filters

Each car shows: year, make, model, price, kms, location, photo.

Click any car for full details and seller contact info.
